hero.title: Event pages, registrations, results, and rankings in one place
hero.description: RunGoMx gives organizers a professional public presence and gives runners a clear path from discovery to results.

proofPaths.title: Three public entry points that keep visitors moving
proofPaths.description: Whether someone arrives to discover a race, verify an outcome, or compare performance, the homepage can direct them to the right destination fast.

events.title: Upcoming events
events.description: Open current event pages with the details runners need before they commit.

results.title: Official results
results.description: Find searchable, trustworthy outcomes that are easy to review and share.

rankings.title: Active rankings
rankings.description: Keep athletes engaged between race days with standings that reward consistency.

eventPages.title: Pages that turn interest into registrations
eventPages.description: Bring schedules, distances, policies, and registration entry points together in a format that feels clear on both mobile and desktop.

highlights.clarity: Present key event information without forcing runners to hunt for answers.
highlights.trust: Show a polished public face that makes an event feel legitimate and ready to join.
highlights.conversion: Keep the path from discovery to registration visible at every step.

participation.title: A smoother path from discovery to confirmation
participation.description: The public experience should reduce friction for runners while keeping organizers in control of the registration journey.

highlights.discover: Help runners quickly understand what the event is and who it is for.
highlights.decide: Keep pricing, dates, and participation details easy to compare.
highlights.commit: Guide people toward registration with confidence instead of guesswork.

resultsRankings.title: Keep the platform useful after race day
resultsRankings.description: Results and rankings give runners a reason to return, compare progress, and stay connected to the broader event ecosystem.

highlights.results: Publish outcomes that feel official, clear, and easy to revisit.
highlights.rankings: Extend engagement beyond a single event with standings that reward repeat participation.
highlights.retention: Turn one-time visitors into returning athletes, supporters, and organizers.

aboutBridge.title: Bridge product value with platform credibility
aboutBridge.description: Use the homepage to connect the event experience with the story behind RunGoMx, so visitors understand both what the platform does and why it matters.

finalCta.title: Launch a stronger public experience for your next event
finalCta.description: Give runners a clearer path into your events and give your organization a platform that still works after registrations close.
